name: DateOutput
description: Date display widget with customizable formatting for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: format
configOptions.label: Date Format
configOptions.description: Date format string using tokens (YYYY, MM, DD, HH, mm, ss). Examples: 'MM/DD/YYYY', 'DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm'

configOptions.name: showTime
configOptions.label: Show Time
configOptions.description: Append time to the date if not already in format string
